stages.concept:
# Unit 153: without + 가정법 과거 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **without + 가정법 과거**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> **Without** water, we **could not** survive.
> 물이 없다면, 우리는 생존할 수 없을 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **without + 명사 = If it were not for ~** — ~이 없다면 (현재 가정)

> **Without** your help, I **would** fail.
> = **If it were not for** your help, I **would** fail.
> = **But for** your help, I **would** fail.
> 네 도움이 없다면, 나는 실패할 것이다.

> **Without** air, nothing **could** live.
> = **If it were not for** air, nothing **could** live.
> 공기가 없다면, 아무것도 살 수 없을 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 세 가지 같은 표현:

| 표현 | 뜻 |
|------|------|
| Without + 명사 | ~이 없다면 |
| If it were not for + 명사 | ~이 없다면 |
| But for + 명사 | ~이 없다면 |

**Q. 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르세요.**
"Without air, we would die."
1. If it were not for air, we would die. ✅
2. Because of air, we would die.
3. If it had not been for air, we would die.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 훌륭해요! '공기가 없다면, 우리는 죽을 것이다'라는 현재 사실의 반대를 가정하는 구문이므로 'Without'은 'If it were not for'로 바꿔 쓸 수 있답니다. 

🧑‍🎓 학생: Without = If it were not for = But for! 셋 다 '~이 없다면'이란 뜻이군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 153: without + 가정법 과거 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 보기에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
물이 없다면 우리는 살 수 없을 것이다.
Without water, we (     ) survive.
보기: could not / would not have
> **정답** could not (couldn't)

---

**02.** 네 도움이 없다면 나는 못할 것이다.
Without your help, I (     ) do it.
> **정답** could not (couldn't)

---

**03.** 태양이 없다면 지구는 춥을 것이다.
Without the sun, the Earth (     ) cold.
> **정답** would be

---

**04.** 음악이 없다면 세상은 지루할 것이다.
Without music, the world (     ) boring.
> **정답** would be

---

**05.** 친구가 없다면 나는 외로울 것이다.
Without friends, I (     ) lonely.
> **정답** would be

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 if 가정법으로 바꾸시오.
Without water, we couldn't survive.
> **정답** If it were not for water, we couldn't survive.

---

**07.** Without your help, I couldn't do it.
> **정답** If it were not for your help, I couldn't do it.

---

**08.** Without the sun, the Earth would be cold.
> **정답** If it were not for the sun, the Earth would be cold.

---

**09.** Without music, life would be boring.
> **정답** If it were not for music, life would be boring.

---

**10.** Without friends, I would be lonely.
> **정답** If it were not for friends, I would be lonely.

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
공기가 없다면 우리는 숨을 쉴 수 없을 것이다.
air, we breathe.
> **정답** Without, couldn't

---

**12.** 네 도움이 없다면 이것을 끝낼 수 없을 것이다.
your help, I finish this.
> **정답** Without, couldn't

---

**13.** 물이 없다면 식물은 자랄 수 없을 것이다.
water, plants grow.
> **정답** Without, couldn't

---

**14.** 인터넷이 없다면 생활이 불편할 것이다.
the Internet, life uncomfortable.
> **정답** Without, would be

---

**15.** 건강이 없다면 행복할 수 없을 것이다.
health, we be happy.
> **정답** Without, couldn't

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
물이 없다면 살 수 없을 것이다.
Without we water couldn't survive
> **정답** Without / water / we / couldn't / survive

---

**17.** 태양이 없다면 지구는 춥을 것이다.
Without the sun Earth the would be cold
> **정답** Without / the / sun / the / Earth / would / be / cold

---

**18.** 네 도움이 없다면 못할 것이다.
Without help your I couldn't do it
> **정답** Without / your / help / I / couldn't / do / it

---

**19.** 음악이 없다면 세상은 지루할 것이다.
Without the music world would be boring
> **정답** Without / music / the / world / would / be / boring

---

**20.** 친구가 없다면 외로울 것이다.
Without I friends would be lonely
> **정답** Without / friends / I / would / be / lonely
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 153: without + 가정법 과거 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Without the jacket, you ______________________
very cold now.
will feel
feel
would feel
would have felt
> **정답** would feel

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Without a smartphone, I _____________ bored now.
would have been
would be
will be
are
> **정답** would be

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 알맞지 않은 것을 고르시오.
____________________ air, no one could survive on
earth.
If it were for
But for
If it were not for
Without
> **정답** If it were for

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_____________________________ electricity, we
wouldn't be able to watch TV.
If it were not for
If it were for
With
But
> **정답** If it were not for

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______________________ technology, our lives
would be very inconvenient.
But
If it was not for
With
If it were not for
> **정답** If it were not for

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Without the life jacket, I couldn't swim in the sea.
If it was not for the life jacket, I couldn't swim
in the sea.
If it were not for the life jacket, I couldn't swim
in the sea.
If it were for the life jacket, I couldn't swim in
the sea.
But for the life jacket, I couldn't swim in the
sea.
> **정답** If it were not for the life jacket, I couldn't swim in the sea., But for the life jacket, I couldn't swim in the sea.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
But for water, we could not live.
If it is not for water, we could not live.
Without water, we could not live.
If it were not for water, we could not live.
With water, we could not live.
> **정답** If it were not for water, we could not live., Without water, we could not live.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Without the Internet, our lives would be very
different.
If it were not for the Internet, our lives would
be very different.
But for the Internet, our lives wouldn't be very
different.
If it is not for the Internet, our lives would be
very different.
But for the Internet, our lives would be very
different.
> **정답** If it were not for the Internet, our lives would be very different., But for the Internet, our lives would be very different.

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
But for my sister's support, I couldn't study abroad.
Without my sister's support, I couldn't study
abroad.
If it was not for my sister's support, I couldn't
study abroad.
Without my sister's support, I can't study
abroad.
If it were not for my sister's support, I couldn't
study abroad.
> **정답** Without my sister's support, I couldn't study abroad., If it were not for my sister's support, I couldn't study abroad.

---

**10.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
If it were not for my glasses, I couldn't read books.
Without my glasses, I couldn't read books.
Because I don't have my glasses, I can't read
books.
Without my glasses, I could read books.
But my glasses, I couldn't read books.
> **정답** Without my glasses, I couldn't read books., Because I don't have my glasses, I can't read books.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
But for the air conditioner, our house would
be very hot in summer.
Without the air conditioner, our house would
be very hot in summer.
If it were not for the air conditioner, our house
would be very hot in summer.
If it was not for the air conditioner, our house
would be very hot in summer.
> **정답** If it was not for the air conditioner, our house would be very hot in summer.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
If it were not for your help, we could not win
the game.
If it were not for your help, we can not win the
game.
But for your help, we could not win the game.
Without your help, we could not win the
game.
> **정답** If it were not for your help, we can not win the game.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
But for her money, he would be homeless.
If it was not for her money, he would be
homeless.
If it were not for her money, he would be
homeless.
Without her money, he would be homeless.
> **정답** If it was not for her money, he would be homeless.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
If it were not for the Sun, nothing could live on
Earth.
But for the Sun, nothing could live on Earth.
Without the Sun, nothing could live on Earth.
If it were it not for the Sun, nothing could have
lived on Earth.
> **정답** If it were it not for the Sun, nothing could have lived on Earth.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
If it were not for Bell, we can't speak over the
telephone now.
Without Bell, we could not speak over the
telephone now.
But for Bell, we could not speak over the
telephone now.
If it were not for Bell, we could not speak over
the telephone now.
> **정답** If it were not for Bell, we can't speak over the telephone now.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
사랑이 없다면, 삶은 의미가 없을 텐데.
But for love, life wouldn't be meaningless.
If it were not for love, life would be
meaningless.
But for love, life would be meaningless.
If it were not for love, life will be meaningless.
> **정답** But for love, life would be meaningless., If it were not for love, life would be meaningless.

---

**17.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
그 설명서가 없다면 우리는 이 컴퓨터를 조립할 수 없을 텐데.
If it were not for that manual, we can't
assemble this computer.
Without that manual, we couldn't assemble
this computer.
If it were not for that manual, we couldn't
assemble this computer.
But for that manual, we could assemble this
computer.
> **정답** Without that manual, we couldn't assemble this computer., If it were not for that manual, we couldn't assemble this computer.

---

**18.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
내 스마트폰이 없다면, 나는 아주 지루할 텐데.
If it were not for my smart phone, I would be
very bored.
Without my smart phone, I would be very
bored.
But for my smart phone, I would have been
very bored.
If it were not for my smart phone, I wouldn't
be very bored.
> **정답** Without my smart phone, I would be very bored., If it were not for my smart phone, I would be very bored.

---

**19.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
이 장비가 없다면 아버지는 차를 수리할 수 없을 텐데
But for this equipment, my father wouldn't be
able to repair his car.
If it were not this equipment, my father won't
be able to repair his car.
Without this equipment, my father would be
able to repair his car.
If it were not for this equipment, my father
wouldn't be able to repair his car.
> **정답** But for this equipment, my father wouldn't be able to repair his car., If it were not for this equipment, my father wouldn't be able to repair his car.

---

**20.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
그 밧줄이 없다면 우리는 그 산을 올라갈 수 없을 텐데
Without the rope, we couldn't climb the
mountain.
If it was not for the rope, we couldn't climb
the mountain.
If it were not for the rope, we can't climb the
mountain.
But for the rope, we couldn't climb the
mountain.
> **정답** Without the rope, we couldn't climb the mountain., But for the rope, we couldn't climb the mountain.
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 153 without + 가정법 과거중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
Without you, I would be lonely.
→ If  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , I
would be lonely.
정답 it, were, not, for, you

---

**02.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
If it were not for your help, I could not do anything.
→ But  (     )   (     )   (     ) , I could not do
anything.
정답 for, your, help

---

**03.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
But for a computer, I couldn't finish it in time.
→ If  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
, I couldn't finish it in time.
정답 it, were, not, for, a, computer

---

**04.** 의미가 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
If it were not for your advice, I wouldn't be able to
finish my science project.
→ Without  (     )   (     ) , I wouldn't be able to
finish my science project.
정답 your, advice

---

**05.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 가정법
문장을 완성하시오.
소음 공해가 없다면, 나는 밤에 잘 잘 텐데.
힌트 (     ) without, noise pollution, sleep
  (     )   (     ) , I  (     )   (     )  well at night.
정답 Without, noise, pollution, would, sleep

---

**06.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 가정법
문장을 완성하시오.
자동차가 없다면, 우리는 멀리 여행을 갈 수 없을 텐데.
힌트 (     ) if,cars, travel
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  cars, we
  (     )   (     )  far away.
정답 If, it, were, not, for, could, not, travel

---

**07.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 가정법
문장을 완성하시오.
그 지도가 없다면 우리는 길을 잃을 텐데.
힌트 (     ) but, for, the map, get lost
  (     )   (     )   (     ) , we  (     )  
.
정답 But, for, the, map, would, get, lost

---

**08.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
If  it  [was]  [not]  [for]  [her]  [phone]
[number,]  [we]  [could]  [not]  [call]  [her.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 was → were

---

**09.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[But]  [the]  [tent,]  [we]  [could]  [not]
[sleep]  [in]  [the]  [mountain.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 But → But for (Without)

---

**10.** 문장에서 틀린부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰세요.
[With]  a  [car]  [navigation,]  [we]
[could]  [not]  [be]  [able]  [to]  [find]
[his]  [house.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 With → Without

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 153: without + 가정법 과거 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Without the blanket, you ______________________ very cold now.
will feel feel would feel would have felt
> 정답: would feel

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Without a computer, I _____________ bored now. would have been would be will be are
> 정답: would be

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 알맞지 않은 것을 고르시오.
____________________ water, no one could survive on earth.
If it were for But for If it were not for Without
> 정답: If it were for

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_____________________________ sunlight, plants wouldn't be able to grow.
If it were not for If it were for With But
> 정답: If it were not for

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______________________ computers, our work would be very slow.
But If it was not for With If it were not for
> 정답: If it were not for

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Without the helmet, I couldn't ride the motorcycle safely.
If it was not for the helmet, I couldn't ride the motorcycle safely.
If it were not for the helmet, I couldn't ride the motorcycle safely.
If it were for the helmet, I couldn't ride the motorcycle safely.
But for the helmet, I couldn't ride the motorcycle safely.
> 정답: If it were not for the helmet, I couldn't ride the motorcycle safely., But for the helmet

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) But for oxygen, we could not breathe.
If it is not for oxygen, we could not breathe.
Without oxygen, we could not breathe.
If it were not for oxygen, we could not breathe.
With oxygen, we could not breathe.
> 정답: If it were not for oxygen, we could not breathe., Without

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Without the library, our studies would be very difficult.
If it were not for the library, our studies would be very difficult.
But for the library, our studies wouldn't be very difficult.
If it is not for the library, our studies would be very difficult.
But for the library, our studies would be very difficult.
> 정답: If it were not for the library, our studies would be very, But for the library, our studies would be very difficult.

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) But for my brother's encouragement, I couldn't join the team.
Without my brother's encouragement, I couldn't join the team.
If it was not for my brother's encouragement, I couldn't join the team.
Without my brother's encouragement, I can't join the team.
If it were not for my brother's encouragement, I couldn't join the team.
> 정답: Without my brother's encouragement, I couldn't join, If it were not for my brother's encouragement

---

**10.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) If it were not for my contact lenses, I couldn't see the board.
Without my contact lenses, I couldn't see the board.
Because I don't have my contact lenses, I can't see the board.
Without my contact lenses, I could see the board.
But my contact lenses, I couldn't see the board.
> 정답: Without my contact lenses, I couldn't see the board., Because I

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
But for the heater, our room would be very cold in winter.
Without the heater, our room would be very cold in winter.
If it were not for the heater, our room would be very cold in winter.
If it was not for the heater, our room would be very cold in winter.

---
